title: Chokidar-based file watcher for incremental pseudo indexing
purpose: Monitors project files and pseudo prose files for changes, triggering incremental scans of the pseudo indexer when modifications occur.
module_context: Exports PseudoWatcherOptions interface, PseudoWatcher interface, and createPseudoWatcher factory function. Defines constants for prose directory path and default debounce time. Imports chokidar, SCANNER_EXCLUDES, and readProseFile utility.

methods.name: createPseudoWatcher
methods.normalized_params: (project: string, indexer: PseudoIndexer, opts?: PseudoWatcherOptions): PseudoWatcher

steps.content: Resolve the project path to an absolute path if it is not already absolute.
Construct the absolute path to the pseudo prose directory.
Initialize internal state variables for tracking watcher status and handles.
Build and return a pseudo watcher object with start and stop methods.
Convert the input path to an absolute path if it is not already absolute.
Check if the absolute path starts with the pseudo prose root directory.
If the watcher is stopped, do nothing.
Add the file path to the set of pending paths.
If no flush timer is active, set a new timer to flush pending paths after the debounce interval.
If there are no pending paths, return immediately.
Create a batch of pending paths and clear the pending set.
Separate the paths into source paths and prose paths.
Process source paths by running an incremental scan on the indexer.
For each prose path, read the prose file and trigger an incremental scan for the referenced source file.
If the watcher is already started, return immediately.
Load the chokidar module dynamically.
IF chokidar fails to load, log a warning and return.
Set up an ignore function to filter out excluded file paths.
Create a file watcher for the project root directory with specified options.
Attach event listeners to the source watcher for file add, change, and unlink events.
Create a file watcher for the pseudo prose directory with specified options.
Attach event listeners to the prose watcher for file add, change, and unlink events.
Mark the watcher as stopped.
Clear the flush timer if it is active.
Clear the set of pending paths.
Wait for any ongoing flush operation to complete.
Close the source and prose file watchers if they exist.
